title: Spinach Fold
description: A peppery and fluffy whole30-friendly spinach fold dish that's adventurous with its French twist.
instructions: Chop the spinach into small pieces.
In a bowl, mix together chopped spinach, grated parmesan cheese, eggs, salt, and pepper. Season with a pinch of salt and black pepper if needed.
Divide the mixture evenly among 4-6 individual ramekins or oven-safe plates for easy serving.
Bake in preheated oven for about 15 minutes until set and golden brown on top.
Serve hot as an appetizer or light meal.
